description: Configure the 'ne_countries' layer in the 'ne' workspace to only advertise and accept requests in 'EPSG:4326' and 'EPSG:3857' using the GeoServer Web Administration Interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, user: admin, pass: Admin123!). Ensure the layer's WMS settings are restricted to these two SRS codes and the response policy excludes all others.
